prompt:
Polished black-and-white vertical Korean webtoon/manga for a practical blog explainer, 4 stacked panels, mobile-readable. Theme: lodging discount amounts depend on price and multiple-night condition. Use friendly Korean guide woman with round glasses explaining to traveler at small lodging desk. Large clean speech balloons, no extra text outside specified Korean.
Panel 1: guide holds simple receipt under 7만원. Speech balloon from guide, tail to guide mouth: "7만 미만은 2만원"
Panel 2: guide points to receipt 7만원 이상. Speech balloon from guide, tail to guide mouth: "7만 이상은 3만원"
Panel 3: two-night calendar appears with under 14만원 receipt. Speech balloon from guide, tail to guide mouth: "연박 14만 미만은 5만원"
Panel 4: traveler checks two-night 14만원 이상 booking. Speech balloon from traveler, tail to traveler mouth: "연박 14만 이상이면 7만원!"
Clean printed manga style, black-and-white, thick panel borders, readable Korean, no garbled text, no brand logos, no extra captions.
